prompt: What's the SCC standard for utility rate recovery in Virginia? Cite the controlling Va. Code section and any leading State Corporation Commission decision.
What did the Virginia Attorney General opine about a sheriff's authority to enforce federal immigration detainers without a judicial warrant? Provide the AG opinion citation.
How is a military pension divided in a Virginia divorce under the Uniformed Services Former Spouses' Protection Act? Cite the controlling Va. Code section and the leading Virginia case.
What is the statute of limitations for a Virginia Wage Payment Act claim under Va. Code § 40.1-29, and what damages are recoverable?
Find Virginia Court of Appeals unpublished opinions on spoliation of electronic evidence. Provide the case names and citations.
What did the Fairfax Circuit Court hold in its most recent published landlord-tenant case applying VRLTA § 55.1-1244 emergency hearing provisions? Provide the case name and citation.
What did Virginia's highest court say about qualified immunity for police officers in excessive-force cases? Cite the controlling Virginia Supreme Court decision.
What's the summary judgment standard in Fairfax Circuit Court? Cite the controlling Virginia rule or statute.
What's the page limit for opening briefs filed in Richmond? Specify which court applies.
Is Auer deference still good law in Virginia administrative appeals? Cite controlling authority and address any recent changes.
What is the current Virginia minimum wage for 2026 and the tip credit treatment for tipped employees? Cite the controlling Va. Code section.
What are the notice requirements under Va. Code § 8.01-581.12? Quote the operative text of the statute.
Provide both the Virginia Reports citation AND the parallel S.E.2d citation for Cantwell v. Cantwell, 109 Va. 776 (1909). Both citations must be exact and verifiable.
What did Justice Cynthia Kinser hold in her opinion in Toghill v. Commonwealth, 289 Va. 220 (2015)? Quote the holding verbatim.

Compare the holdings in Cline v. Dunlora South, LLC, 284 Va. 102 (2012) and Quisenberry v. Huntington Ingalls Inc., 296 Va. 233 (2018) on the duty owed to non-landowners. State each holding precisely.
